title: Food App
description:
A food delivery app clone built using React Native

- All states inside the app are managed using Redux
- Fully functional mobile application

title: Websocket Microservices
description:
Developed a WebSocket service using Spring Boot and Go

- Performance comparison between Spring Boot and Go
- Analysis of boilerplate code required for each implementation
- Optimized for real-time communication

title: Wordle React App
description:
Wordle is a popular word puzzle game where players have five attempts to guess a five-letter word.

**Game Mechanics:**
- Green: Correct placement
- Yellow: Correct letter but wrong position
- Gray: Incorrect letter

Minimal design and brain-teasing simplicity

title: Personal Agent Using Llama3
description:
Developed a lightweight personal assistant application with integrated Email and Google Meet agents using LLaMA3 and LangChain

**Features:**
- Summarize user's day from emails and meetings
- Respond to general-purpose prompts
- Intelligent agent orchestration
